title: CHARBONE Secures its First Order for Clean UHP Hydrogen from a US Customer in NY State
content: CHARBONE CORPORATION has secured its first U.S. order for clean Ultra High Purity (UHP) hydrogen from a New York-based customer affiliated with a major Japanese industrial conglomerate. This deal represents a strategic breakthrough into the American market, specifically within "Tech Valley," a key technology corridor. The order will be fulfilled using CHARBONE's existing production capacity. While specific details regarding volume, duration, and financial terms remain undisclosed to maintain competitive advantage, the company views this as a validation of its platform and UHP hydrogen quality. CEO Dave Gagnon emphasized that this milestone confirms CHARBONE's ability to meet the demands of North America's advanced technology sectors and serves as a stepping stone for further expansion in the region.
author: Analysts Account
